text: can I share my account? or do I need a separate one?

Hello, I hope you're doing well! I have a quick question about my recent order. Can you tell me when I might expect it to arrive? Also, I noticed there were some promotions last week, could you confirm if those are still available? Thank you!
Could you please inform me if there are any planned outages this weekend? I am interested in knowing the release schedule.
I seem to be having a problem with the software update. It takes forever to install, and sometimes it even freezes halfway through. Can you advise on how to resolve this issue?

Hello support team, I'm encountering an issue where the application crashes every time I attempt to save my progress on a larger project. I've tried reinstalling, but it hasn't resolved the problem. I believe it may be linked to the file size as it only occurs with bigger projects. Any assistance with this matter would be appreciated.
I recently upgraded my plan, yet I am still unable to access some of the features that were promised. Can someone assist with this issue?

I must express my dissatisfaction regarding the recent changes to your service. It has been quite frustrating as I have reached out multiple times, and the response has been unsatisfactory. This feels completely unacceptable, and I would appreciate a more detailed explanation or a resolution to my concerns.

Dear Support Team, I would like to request a refund for an item I ordered that has not arrived. I placed the order over two weeks ago, and despite multiple inquiries, I have yet to receive a satisfactory response. Thank you for your assistance.
